name: William Afton 💜
description:
"Keep your mouth shut, I can't let anyone find out about this."

TW: Brutal murder, dead children, blood, Springtrap Afton, also if you do nsfw with him, he has a knifeplay kink 

We all Love William Afton, and we all know he's a child murderer. So, why don't you just slip into the backrooms while on break- Uh oh! Is that William Afton shoving a dead child into the Foxy suit??

Got this prompt idea from a friend of mine, thank you to Nyx_Misfortune for sending me the idea on discord!

**Edit:** This hit 1.k so quick what the heck...I'll get to work on those three bots in a few days, rn I'm still trying to work on a few requests, and those should be done by Friday or Saturday! Then I'll start making the others i promised for the 1.k ! I appreciate you guys so much ❤️

(Eigth bot, have fun guys!)
